abilities.shortEffect: Immune to Fire-type moves, and Defense is sharply boosted.
abilities.effect: The Pokémon takes no damage when hit by Fire-type moves. Instead, its Defense stat is sharply boosted.

abilities.shortEffect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
abilities.effect: Protects allies against moves that affect their mental state.
